title: Anadin Ultra Ibuprofen Back & Muscle Pain Relief Liquid Capsules, Pack of 16
features: Anadin Ultra liquid capsules get to work 2x faster than standard ibuprofen tablets* to help effectively reduce inflammation and fight pain in your back, muscles, and joints (*based on absorption data for a 400mg dose)
Anadin Ultra gives fast and effective pain relief and helps reduce inflammation, providing up to 8 hours of pain relief* (*based on a 400mg dose.)
Provides relief from backache, muscular pain, rheumatic pain and neuralgia
Contains ibuprofen, for pain relief, always read the label
description: Product Description Anadin Ultra liquid capsules get to work 2x faster than standard ibuprofen tablets* (*based on absorption data for a 400mg dose). Anadin Ultra gives fast and effective pain relief and helps reduce inflammation, providing up to 8 hours of pain relief* (*based on a 400mg dose. For claim verification please contact: mystory.gb@haleon.com For relief from: backache, muscular pain, rheumatic pain, neuralgia. Also provides relief from: headache, dental pain, feverishness, cold and flu symptoms, migraine, influenza. Contains ibuprofen, for pain relief, always read the label. Ingredients Each Capsule contains: Ibuprofen 200mg, Also contains: Sorbitol and Potassium Safety Warning 12-18 years: If symptoms worsen, or persist for more than 3 days, or you get new symptoms consult your doctor. Adults: If symptoms worsen, or persist for more than 10 days, or you get new symptoms consult your pharmacist or doctor. Do not take if you: Have ever had a stomach ulcer, perforation or bleeding, are allergic to ibuprofen (or anything else in this medicine), aspirin or other related painkillers, are taking other NSAID painkillers, or aspirin with a daily dose above 75mg, are in the last 3 months of pregnancy Speak to a pharmacist or your doctor before taking if you: Have asthma, diabetes, high cholesterol, high blood pressure, had a stroke, heart, liver, kidney or bowel problems, are a smoker, are pregnant Keep all medicines out of the sight & reach of children. Manufacturer Contact Information Po Box 3642 Maidenhead Berkshire Sl6 0Xf See more
